meta.title: Adam Crain on ICS Protocols
meta.description: 3-minutes of highlights from Adam Crain's OnRamp Online video on ICS Protocols. The OnRamp is an accelerated ICS security training program. It's not designed to make you an expert or even a practitioner. It is designed to get you up to speed fast so you can participate in ICS risk discussions in your organization.
